title: Codectx Configuration
description: Schema for codectx.yml. Validates the project-level configuration that declares documentation package identity, dependencies, session context, and registry settings. This file serves two contexts: as a project manifest (full configuration) and as a published package manifest (identity and dependencies only).

type.description: Project type. 'project' (default) is a full documentation environment. 'package' is a documentation package authoring project with a package/ directory containing publishable content alongside the docs/ authoring workspace.

root.description: Documentation root directory relative to the project root. All documentation paths are relative to this root. Defaults to 'docs'. Project-only field.

author.description: GitHub username or organization that owns this package. Required for publishing. Used to construct the package URL: github.com/<author>/codectx-<name>.

session.description: Always-loaded session context configuration. These are compiled into .codectx/compiled/context.md and loaded at the start of every AI session. Project-only field.

always_loaded.description: Ordered list of paths and package references compiled into context.md. Supports local paths (e.g., 'foundation/coding-standards'), package-specific paths (e.g., 'react-patterns@community/foundation/component-principles'), and entire packages (e.g., 'company-standards@acme'). Order matters — documents appear in this order.

budget.description: Maximum token budget for always-loaded context. The compiler warns if assembled content exceeds this.

dependencies.description: Package dependencies. In project context, keys are 'name@author:version' with object values containing an 'active' boolean. In published package context, keys are 'name@author' with string values containing semver range constraints (e.g., '>=1.0.0').

oneOf.description: Semver range constraint for published package dependencies (e.g., '>=1.0.0', 'latest').

registry.description: Package registry for dependency resolution. Packages are GitHub repos using the codectx-[name] naming convention (e.g., react-patterns@community resolves to github.com/community/codectx-react-patterns). Project-only field.

projectDependency.description: A project-level dependency entry with activation state.

active.description: Whether this package is included in compiled output. Inactive packages remain installed in .codectx/packages/ but are excluded from compilation.
